member_descriptions: dark wooden dresser corner with knob
member_long_descriptions: Close-up view of a dark reddish-brown wooden dresser front showing one drawer with a round brass knob, molded trim and a glossy but worn top surface; left side and top are partially edge-cropped with visible surface scratches and small chips — estimated ~0.6 m from camera.

Close-up of a reddish-brown polished wooden rectangular dining table top with visible wood grain and plank seams, slight surface sheen and a lighter patch near the upper right; edges and nearby chairs are partially cropped — estimated camera distance about 0.7 m.
clusters.representative_description: Close-up view of a dark reddish-brown wooden dresser front showing one drawer with a round brass knob, molded trim and a glossy but worn top surface; left side and top are partially edge-cropped with visible surface scratches and small chips — estimated ~0.6 m from camera.

member_descriptions: white paneled interior door with handle
member_long_descriptions: Small white plastic rectangular faceplate with two vertical rocker switches mounted flush on a wall; surface shows slight scuffing/soiling and the image is slightly blurred and low-resolution, but the switch assembly fills most of the crop and is not edge-cut — estimated distance ~1.0 m from camera.

Painted white interior door with two raised panels (arched upper panel and rectangular lower panel), dark metal lever handle on the left and visible hinges on the right indicating a right-hinged door; door and frame are fully visible and appear intact — estimated camera distance ~2.0 m.
clusters.representative_description: Small white plastic rectangular faceplate with two vertical rocker switches mounted flush on a wall; surface shows slight scuffing/soiling and the image is slightly blurred and low-resolution, but the switch assembly fills most of the crop and is not edge-cut — estimated distance ~1.0 m from camera.

member_descriptions: dark wooden frame, left edge crop
member_long_descriptions: Partial rectangular picture frame of dark brown wood with a gold-gilt inner edge and decorative molding; top, right and bottom edges are visible while the left side is cut off, showing a glossy finish with minor scuffs and glass glare over a sailboat print — approximately 0.7 m from the camera.

Partial view of a small white rectangular picture frame with a stepped inner mat and smooth painted surface; the right/center of the frame is visible and the left edge is cropped by the image border, slightly blurred — estimated ~0.8 m from camera.

Partial left-edge view of a dark brown wooden picture frame with a glossy finish and decorative inner molding around a mounted grayscale sailboat print; frame is wall-mounted and cut off by the image border, approximately 0.6 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Partial left-edge view of a dark brown wooden picture frame with a glossy finish and decorative inner molding around a mounted grayscale sailboat print; frame is wall-mounted and cut off by the image border, approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

member_long_descriptions: Vertical gold-toned picture frame with a beige/cream mat surrounding a printed document or certificate behind glass; the rectangular frame is intact, wall-mounted and fully visible in the crop, estimated distance ~1.5 meters from the camera.

Partial dark-brown wooden side chair with turned/spiral legs and a visible seat edge; appears small and antique-style with a slightly worn polished finish, edge-cropped at the lower-left of the image, approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Dark reddish-brown mahogany cabinet/sideboard with a glossy lacquer finish, visible narrow top drawers and paneled lower doors with small round brass/gold knobs; decorative molding along the top edge and a terracotta plant pot sitting on the top surface; the right and lower edges of the unit are cropped in the image indicating a partial view; appears approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Arched-top white-painted window with double-hung frame and closed horizontal slatted blinds, beige fabric valance over the arch, faint frosted/smudged patch on the lower blind and minor paint chipping on left trim; outdoor driveway and foliage seen through the slats — window appears about 2.5 m from the camera.

Partial cream/ivory upholstered bench with a flat cushioned seat and low wooden support, seen edge-cropped in the image and visible behind slatted dining chairs; appears to be indoors near a window and roughly 1.5 meters from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Partial cream/ivory upholstered bench with a flat cushioned seat and low wooden support, seen edge-cropped in the image and visible behind slatted dining chairs; appears to be indoors near a window and roughly 1.5 meters from the camera.

member_long_descriptions: Partial crop showing three dark glossy wooden chair backs with curved bentwood frames and reflective lacquered finish, closely aligned and cut off at the bottom edge; appears to be about 1.0 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Partial crop showing three dark glossy wooden chair backs with curved bentwood frames and reflective lacquered finish, closely aligned and cut off at the bottom edge; appears to be about 1.0 m from the camera.

member_descriptions: dark wooden chair, beige seat approx 1m
member_long_descriptions: Partial, edge-cropped dark wooden chair with an ornate rounded slatted back and a beige upholstered seat cushion; the right side is cut off by the image border and the chair appears close to the camera (approximately 1.0 m).
clusters.representative_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark wooden chair with an ornate rounded slatted back and a beige upholstered seat cushion; the right side is cut off by the image border and the chair appears close to the camera (approximately 1.0 m).

member_long_descriptions: Partial foreground dark brown carved wooden chair back with twisted vertical slats and a glossy finish, edge-cropped at the image border; appears close to the camera (≈0.5 m).
clusters.representative_description: Partial foreground dark brown carved wooden chair back with twisted vertical slats and a glossy finish, edge-cropped at the image border; appears close to the camera (≈0.5 m).

member_long_descriptions: Partial edge crop of a dark brown wooden dining chair back showing multiple narrow vertical carved slats and a gently curved top rail; visible wood grain and a slight glossy varnish indicate finished hardwood and the visible portion appears to be about 0.8 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Partial edge crop of a dark brown wooden dining chair back showing multiple narrow vertical carved slats and a gently curved top rail; visible wood grain and a slight glossy varnish indicate finished hardwood and the visible portion appears to be about 0.8 m from the camera.
